---
title: "Open access events on data science in transport"
date: 2021-12-03
categories: [event]
tags: []
description: "Upcoming events on data science in transport planning"
---

A couple of events where I and colleagues presented on building tools for evidence-based decision making:

1. **Evidence to Support Active Travel in the Planning System** - LSSI and Department for Transport, June 2021
2. **Propensity to Cycle Tool Advanced Training Workshop** - December 2021

These events covered topics in data science skills for transport planning and using tools like the PCT for evidence-based planning.
